title: Bitcoin’s Retreating Retail Army Exposes Fresh Fragility
title_cn: 比特币撤退的零售大军暴露出新的脆弱性
summary: Bitcoin spent years trying to shed its reputation as a playground for speculative retail traders. Its latest selloff is exposing the tradeoff: Wall Street brought scale and legitimacy, but the retail buyers who once helped absorb sharp declines have largely vanished.

title: Investor Who Scored 900% Win in 2008 Crisis Has New Big Short Bet
title_cn: 在 2008 年危机中获得 900% 胜利的投资者又进行了新的大空头押注
summary: Hedge fund manager Lee Robinson notched a 900% gain during the global financial crisis by turning a $20 million position into $200 million with timely bets against the US subprime mortgage sector.

title: Hollow Brook's Richter Eyes Opportunities Beyond AI Hype
title_cn: Hollow Brook 的 Richter 看到人工智能炒作之外的机遇
summary: The global race to finance the AI boom is on, with companies from SpaceX to SK Hynix seeking fresh capital to fuel growth. But beyond the headlines and geopolitical noise, where are the real long-term opportunities? Philip Richter, President and Co-Chief Investment Officer at Hollow Brook Wealth Management, joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" to discuss where he's finding value in today's market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Argentina evita Wall Street y consigue dólares por debajo del 7%

title: Copper Extends Losses as Dollar and Hawkish Fed Pressure Metals

summary: Famed value investor Seth Klarman offered a surprising answer at a conference this month when asked where he’s seeing opportunities in the world of distressed assets.

title: Hertz Tumbles on Q2 Miss; FedEx Falls on Profit Margin Decline | Stock Movers
title_cn: 赫兹在第二季度失利；联邦快递因利润率下降而下跌库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Cerebras (CBRS) shares are lower after the company gave an annual sales forecast that disappointed investors. Revenue in 2026 will be $855 million to $865 million, Cerebras said, while analysts projected $824.8 million.
- FedEx (FDX) is dipping after it reported profit that beat Wall Street’s expectations as the courier navigated tumultuous trade policies and rising costs. The company's profit margin for the past quarter declined to 8.4%, below analysts’ expectations, due to "significant headwinds."
- Hertz (HTZ) shares are tumbling after the rental car company reported preliminary second-quarter adjusted corporate Ebitda that missed the average analyst estimate. Additionally, Hertz filed to offer $100 million of stock, lent to JPMorgan via a share lending agreement. The company won’t receive any proceeds from the sale of borrowed shares. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Heat Wave Strains Power Supply, Sends Prices Soaring
title_cn: 欧洲热浪导致电力供应紧张，导致价格飙升
summary: Europe’s electricity system is under mounting pressure from an intense heat wave, with extreme swings in power prices as soaring temperatures drive up demand and curb output.

title: Fed Has Time to Keep Rates on Pause, BlackRock's Chaudhuri Says
title_cn: 贝莱德乔胡里表示，美联储有时间暂停加息
summary: Gargi Chaudhuri, BlackRock's chief investment and portfolio strategist, Americas, says there are "tremendous" opportunities in the front-end and belly of the yield curve on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zero Fed Rate Hikes Baked Into S&P Forecast, Says Wells Fargo's Cronk
title_cn: 富国银行的克朗克表示，标准普尔预测中将美联储零加息
summary: Darrell Cronk, Wells Fargo Wealth and Investment Management CIO, says zero interest rate hikes by the Federal Reserve are baked into their forecast that says the S&P 500 will reach 7,900 by the end of this year. He says markets are not in a selloff, he says this is a "rotation within equities." He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Milei Shuns Wall Street to Raise Dollars at Rate Lower Than 7%

summary: Argentine Economy Minister Luis Caputo’s strategy of resisting calls to raise funds in international markets appears to have paid off.

summary: Micron Technology Inc.’s earnings report on Wednesday afternoon is shaping up to be one of the most important in months as investors find themselves suddenly on edge over the sustainability of the AI rally.

title: Musk’s SpaceX Adds Billions in Debt While Cutting Interest
title_cn: 马斯克的 SpaceX 在削减利息的同时增加了数十亿美元的债务
summary: Elon Musk is no stranger to financial alchemy. His latest feat: adding billions of dollars of debt onto his cash-burning business empire while simultaneously cutting its annual interest burden.

title: Qualcomm to Buy Modular for $3.9 Billion to Help AI Push
title_cn: 高通斥资 39 亿美元收购 Modular 助力 AI 推动
summary: Qualcomm Inc. said it is acquiring Modular Inc., for about $3.9 billion in stock, adding artificial intelligence software capabilities that will aid its push into data centers.

title: Trump Orders DOJ to Look Into Gasoline Prices
title_cn: 特朗普命令司法部调查汽油价格
summary: US President Donald Trump ordered the Department of Justice to look into gasoline prices, saying in a Truth Social post, “Prices better start going down a lot faster than what I’m seeing!” Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Paramount’s $110 Billion Warner Bid on Track for EU Approval
title_cn: 派拉蒙 1100 亿美元华纳出价有望获得欧盟批准
summary: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. is on track for European Union approval, with the buyer prepared to allay concerns over film distribution flagged by the bloc’s competition chief Teresa Ribera.

title: AI Is Modeling Mega Storms With Surprising Accuracy
title_cn: 人工智能正在以惊人的精度模拟特大风暴
summary:
AI hurricane forecasts faced a first stress test in 2025: Hurricane Melissa, the strongest Category 5 hurricane in the modern era. AI models are trained on historical data, meaning a storm of this magnitude was not in the training set and potentially not predictable. The AI forecast captured Melissa’s rapid intensification roughly on par with NOAA’s official guidance, suggesting AI weather models may generalize to the extreme events that matter most for energy, infrastructure and insurance risk.

For more, we speak with Ryan Ward, BloombergNEF Weather Associate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MNTN CEO on World Cup Ad Boom
title_cn: MNTN 首席执行官谈世界杯广告热潮
summary: The World Cup is expected to drive more than $10.5 billion in advertising spending worldwide. As AI floods the internet with content, live sports are becoming even more valuable to brands. MNTN CEO Mark Douglas joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" from the Cannes Lions conference to discuss what's driving ad spending. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Led by Bloomberg's Emily Chang and Tom Giles, Bloomberg Tech 2026 brought together the leading CEOs, investors, and innovators who are harnessing technology to change the world around us. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Earnings Take on New Gravity With Market on Edge Over AI
title_cn: 随着市场对人工智能的关注，美光的盈利呈现出新的吸引力
summary:
Tuesday’s stock-market slide was what one Wall Street strategist called a “chip-wreck.”
The semiconductor companies that have led this year’s stock-market advance with triple-digit percentage gains were suddenly hit with a wave of doubts about the sustainability of the AI-driven rally.
Daniel Ives, Global Head of Technology as Wedbush Securities, discusses the broader tech landscape as investors remain jittery on high-flying tech stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI, Broadcom Develop AI Chip Called 'Jalapeno'
title_cn: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 开发名为“Jalapeno”的 AI 芯片
summary: OpenAI and Broadcom Inc. have developed a custom artificial intelligence chip called Jalapeno. OpenAI is now testing the samples. The companies say this chip can cut costs by 50%. Ed Ludlow reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI, Broadcom Unveil Chip to Run Models Faster, Cheaper
title_cn: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出芯片以更快、更便宜地运行模型
summary: OpenAI unveiled its first custom artificial intelligence chip developed in partnership with Broadcom Inc., part of a bid by the ChatGPT maker to gain an edge by tailoring hardware to better run its AI products.

title: Google’s New $100 Speaker Makes a Weak Case for Gemini in the Home
title_cn: 谷歌新推出的 100 美元扬声器让 Gemini 在家庭中的表现不佳
summary: The Google Home Speaker is the first new device of its kind to come from Alphabet Inc. in six years. In that time, Google has reshaped itself as an industry leader in artificial intelligence, with its Gemini platform now ubiquitous across consumer hardware like smartphones and web services like Search, Workspace and YouTube.

title: Amazon Seller Reveals Rare Glimpse of Shadow Bribery Market
title_cn: 亚马逊卖家罕见地一睹影子贿赂市场的风采
summary: Middlemen lurking on message apps like WeChat offer access to company employees they say can grant favors for a price.

title_cn: 微软表示 Copilot AI 帮助摧毁了网络犯罪工具
summary: Investigators used new tools to defeat old malware technology.

title: Biotech Visionary Is Skeptical About AI’s Impact on Medical Innovation
title_cn: 生物技术远见者对人工智能对医疗创新的影响持怀疑态度
summary: The inventor of the groundbreaking Crispr gene-editing technology is skeptical about artificial intelligence replacing human effort in the realm of scientific discovery, adding to a growing debate over its impact on medical research and innovation.

title: Cerebras Plunges After Issuing Disappointing 2026 Sales Outlook
title_cn: Cerebras 发布令人失望的 2026 年销售前景后暴跌
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares plunged in early trading after the newly public chipmaker gave an annual sales forecast that disappointed investors who were expecting the company to carve out a bigger slice of the AI data center market.

title_cn: 丹·艾夫斯表示，美光的盈利将成为市场的“直觉检查时刻”
summary: Dan Ives, global head of tech research and senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, discusses the importance of Wednesday’s earnings from Micron Technologies, tech spending on capex and the AI buildout, and how he views public-private partnerships on AI companies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dubai Holding Weighs Stake in Bain’s Data Center Group Hscale
title_cn: 迪拜控股公司入股贝恩数据中心集团 Hscale

title_cn: 凌逸科技融资11亿美元，股价最高
summary: China’s Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. raised HK$8.3 billion ($1.1 billion) after pricing its Hong Kong listing at the maximum price, with strong investor demand leading the company to reject more than 100 orders, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Fight Against Child Predators Gets Short Shrift While Cases Explode in AI Era
title_cn: 人工智能时代案件激增，打击儿童掠夺者的斗争受到冷遇
summary: Budgets for investigators are falling behind as AI floods the internet with images

title: Waymo Charging Partner Terawatt Raises Up to $300 Million in Debt
title_cn: Waymo 充电合作伙伴 Terawatt 筹集高达 3 亿美元的债务
summary: Terawatt Infrastructure Inc., a company that provides chargers for electric cars and counts Waymo as a customer, said it is borrowing as much as $300 million from banks to support the acquisition and development of charging facilities in the US and abroad.

title: Meta, Microsoft Lead $850 Billion Boom in Data Center Leases
title_cn: Meta 和微软引领数据中心租赁价值 8500 亿美元的热潮
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. and Microsoft Corp. each committed tens of billions of dollars in additional data center leases in their most recent quarters, adding to the massive sums the industry is spending on artificial intelligence.

title: SK Hynix Seeks to Raise $29 Billion in US Listing to Meet AI Chip Demand
title_cn: SK海力士寻求在美国上市筹集290亿美元以满足人工智能芯片需求
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is planning to raise $29.4 billion (45.45 trillion won) in a landmark US listing and expects trading to start on July 10, according to a regulatory filing on Wednesday. The deal, depending on the exchange rate, could be among the top five share sales of all time. Peter Elstrom reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Seeks $29 Billion With US Listing to Fund AI Boom
title_cn: SK 海力士在美国上市寻求 290 亿美元资金，为人工智能繁荣提供资金
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is planning to raise 45.45 trillion won ($29.4 billion) in a landmark US listing, as companies along the artificial intelligence supply chain rush to increase capacity to meet memory chip demand.

title: MGX Sets Up $50 Billion AI Fund
title_cn: MGX 设立 500 亿美元人工智能基金
summary: Abu Dhabi’s MGX has raised close to $50 billion from regional and global investors, marking one of the biggest ever dedicated AI investment vehicles. Nandu Nair reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI-Powered Mass Emails Are Warping Local Energy, Climate Politics
title_cn: 人工智能驱动的群发电子邮件正在扭曲当地能源、气候政治
summary: From California to North Carolina, officials weighing policy changes are being inundated with comments via platforms that tout AI capabilities.

title: Scammers Are Using AI to Create Fake Auto Loan Documents
title_cn: 骗子利用人工智能创建虚假汽车贷款文件
summary: It’s yet another headache for US auto lenders facing the highest delinquency rates in years

title: AI Billionaires Score Win in $29 Million New York Proxy Fight
title_cn: AI 亿万富翁在纽约 2900 万美元代理权争夺战中获胜
summary: Artificial intelligence billionaires including venture capitalist Marc Andreessen and OpenAI President Greg Brockman scored a key victory in a New York City congressional primary that became a $29 million proxy battle over who will control the future of AI.

title: Fintech Unicorn Is Said to Tap Citi and EFG for Cairo Listing
title_cn: 据称，金融科技独角兽将邀请花旗集团和 EFG 在开罗上市
summary: Fintech MNT-Halan is planning an initial public offering of its Egyptian business in Cairo as soon as this year, according to people familiar with the matter, the latest firm preparing a share sale in the Middle East’s most populous nation.

title: Trump Scraps Housing Bill Signing, Demands Voter ID Measure
title_cn: 特朗普取消签署住房法案，要求采取选民身份识别措施
summary: President Donald Trump canceled plans to sign a bipartisan bill aimed at lowering housing costs and increasing supply, escalating his feud with Republicans in the Senate.

title: Trump Cancels Event to Sign Housing Bill
title_cn: 特朗普取消签署住房法案的活动
summary: President Donald Trump canceled plans to sign a bipartisan bill on Wednesday afternoon aimed at lowering housing costs and increasing supply, until Congress approves voting restrictions. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall reports from the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani’s Picks Sweep New York City Primary Races
title_cn: 马姆达尼的选秀横扫纽约市初选
summary: Three candidates endorsed by Zohran Mamdani swept to victory in Democratic congressional primaries on Tuesday, showing that the coalition which powered the New York City mayor to a surprising victory last year is gaining strength. But can it last? Tyler Kendall explains (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lula and Sheinbaum Forge Closer Ties as Latin America Realigns
title_cn: 随着拉丁美洲的重新调整，卢拉和辛鲍姆建立了更紧密的关系
summary: Claudia Sheinbaum rarely speaks highly of other heads of state, but when it comes to Brazil’s Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, she doesn’t hold back.

title: Adams Aide Charged, Ex-NYPD Officials Searched in FBI Probe
title_cn: 亚当斯助手被指控，前纽约警察局官员在联邦调查局调查中接受搜查
summary: Federal prosecutors in Brooklyn have charged Frank Carone, the former chief of staff to Mayor Eric Adams, his brother and two others in connection with an alleged bribery scheme as a long-running corruption scandal rumbles on months after Adams left office.

title: Will Andy Burnham as Prime Minister Spook Bond Markets?
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆（Andy Burnham）担任首相会惊动债券市场吗？
summary:
Andy Burnham appears set to succeed Keir Starmer as prime minister — what could it mean for the UK economy?

Chloe Chaplain explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rheinmetall Defense Ambitions Stung by German Warship Switch
title_cn: 莱茵金属防务公司的野心被德国战舰转换所刺痛
summary: In the four years since the Ukraine war started, German military contractor Rheinmetall AG went from defense also-ran with a narrow focus on munitions to a one-stop shop dabbling in land, sea and even space warfare, and its skyrocketing stock price mirrored those aspirations.

title: US Envoy to Italy Praises Meloni, Downplays Spat With Trump
title_cn: 美国驻意大利特使赞扬梅洛尼，淡化与特朗普的争执
summary: The US ambassador to Italy moved to further ease tensions between the two allies, saying relations are “fine” in the aftermath of a public clash between Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President Donald Trump.

title: 'New Yorkers Are Hungry for a New Kind of Politics,' Says NYC Mayor Mamdani
title_cn: 纽约市市长马姆达尼表示，“纽约人渴望一种新型政治”
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani spoke with reporters at a news conference in the Bronx about last night's Democratic congressional primaries. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani’s Picks Sweep NYC Races as Anti-Establishment Anger Grows
title_cn: 随着反建制愤怒的加剧，马姆达尼的选择横扫纽约市比赛
summary: Three candidates endorsed by Zohran Mamdani swept to victory in Democratic congressional primaries on Tuesday, showing that the coalition which powered the New York City mayor to a surprising victory last year is gaining strength.

title: Here Are the Key Issues Dividing Trump and Senate Republicans
title_cn: 以下是特朗普和参议院共和党人之间存在分歧的关键问题
summary: Top Senate Republicans have a message for President Donald Trump: This is not working.

title: Leftist Candidate Concedes Defeat in Colombian Election
title_cn: 左翼候选人承认在哥伦比亚选举中失败
summary: Leftist Senator Iván Cepeda conceded defeat in Colombia’s presidential runoff, dispelling lingering doubts over the results after preliminary counts showed his rival had won by less than one percentage point.

title: Carlyle's Thomas Says It's Hard to Be Bearish Amid Capex Boom
title_cn: 凯雷的托马斯表示，在资本支出繁荣的情况下很难看空
summary: Jason Thomas, head of global research and investment strategy at Carlyle, discusses how US policies and the AI buildout are shaping markets. He notes nominal GDP growth is driven too heavily by inflation, and that the Federal Reserve’s stance has shifted so much that simply holding rates steady now qualifies as dovish. Thomas speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani Candidates Lead June 23 Primary Fights
title_cn: Mamdani 候选人在 6 月 23 日的初选中领先
summary:
New York City’s Democratic delegation to Congress will have a more progressive tilt after stunning primary wins Tuesday by three leftists backed by Mayor Zohran Mamdani, including two who ousted House Democrats.
Libby Cantrill, Managing Director: Public Policy at PIMCO, discusses her takeaways from recent primaries across the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Carney Moves to Fast-Track Northern Port, Highway Projects
title_cn: 卡尼转向快速通道北部港口、高速公路项目
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government is preparing to fast-track a set of northern infrastructure projects, marking the first time it invokes new powers to speed up the regulatory process.

title: Rubio Meets Gulf Leaders After Rocky Start to US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 美伊会谈开局不利后卢比奥会见海湾领导人
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio met the leaders of the United Arab Emirates and Kuwait on Wednesday, as he looks to reassure Persian Gulf allies of the strength of an interim peace agreement with Iran.

title: NY Pension Head DiNapoli Wins First Primary Challenge in Decades
title_cn: 纽约养老金负责人迪纳波利赢得数十年来的首次初选挑战
summary: New York Comptroller Thomas DiNapoli secured an easy victory in his first primary challenge since 2007, according to a projection by Decision Desk HQ.

title: Swiss Open Talks on Air Defense System to Diversify From Patriot
title_cn: 瑞士公开讨论防空系统从爱国者转向多元化
summary: Switzerland is opening contract talks for a new long-range air defense system, while scaling back a planned sales-tax increase intended to help fund its military buildup.

title: Iran and Oman to Coordinate Evacuations Through Hormuz, IMO Says
title_cn: 国际海事组织表示，伊朗和阿曼将协调通过霍尔木兹海峡的疏散行动
summary: Shippers can transit the Strait of Hormuz via Iranian or Omani-and US-coordinated waters, according to the International Maritime Organization, part of a broader plan to evacuate stranded vessels.

title: Netherlands Lobbies US to Drop Chip Curbs Targeting ASML
title_cn: 荷兰游说美国放弃针对 ASML 的芯片限制
summary: The Netherlands is lobbying the US to not expand export controls on semiconductor equipment, a move that would constrain ASML Holding NV’s ability to sell to China.

title: Bessent Says Warsh Came Out Talking ‘Tough’ on Inflation
title_cn: 贝森特称沃什在通胀问题上发表了“强硬”言论
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent signaled confidence in newly installed Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh and indicated President Donald Trump has given him space to make his own decisions.

title: China Auditor Says Top Banks Evaded Tax, Made Improper Loans
title_cn: 中国审计员称顶级银行逃税、发放不当贷款
summary: China’s top auditor reported to the legislature about government spending and issues uncovered at some of the nation’s top financial institutions — an account that is provided to lawmakers annually.

title: Merz Says German Pension Package to Be Approved by Year-End
title_cn: 默茨称德国养老金计划将于年底前获得批准
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz said his government will aim to push a comprehensive pension overhaul through parliament by the end of the year.

title: Ramaphosa Taps Former Treasury Budget Chief as Economic Adviser
title_cn: 拉马福萨任命前财政部预算主管为经济顾问
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa appointed former National Treasury budget chief Michael Sachs as his economic adviser, bringing a respected fiscal policy technocrat back into the government as the country seeks to accelerate growth and deepen economic reforms.

title: Hungary to Publish Communist-Era Informant Files to Face Past
title_cn: 匈牙利将公布共产主义时代线人档案以面对过去
summary: Hungary plans to declassify communist-era secret services files as part of freshly elected Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s push for the country to come to terms with its past.

title: Mark Rutte’s Impossible Task in Washington
title_cn: 马克·吕特在华盛顿的不可能完成的任务
summary: Steering the always volatile relationship between Trump and NATO

title: Romania’s Biggest Party to Propose Leader Grindeanu for Premier
title_cn: 罗马尼亚最大政党提名领导人格林代亚努担任总理
summary: Romania’s Social Democrats will put forward their leader Sorin Grindeanu as a potential candidate for prime minister during talks with the other pro-European parties in the latest attempt to end political deadlock.

title: China Boosts Whistleblower Tools to Police Mineral Exports
title_cn: 中国加强举报工具以监管矿产出口
summary: China said it is strengthening the ways whistleblowers can report violations of export controls on strategic minerals and related dual-use items.

title: UN-Commissioned Report Says Israel Targeted Gazan Children
title_cn: 联合国委托报告称以色列针对加沙儿童
summary: A United Nations-commissioned report has concluded that Israel deliberately targeted and killed Palestinian children during the war in Gaza, an accusation which the country rejects.

title: IAEA Says ‘War of Words’ Won’t Stop Iran Nuclear Inspections
title_cn: 国际原子能机构称“口水战”不会阻止伊朗核检查
summary: The international nuclear watchdog responsible for verifying Iran’s stockpile of near-bomb-grade uranium dismissed the conflicting signals from Tehran and Washington overnight and said it expects to resume full monitoring at some stage.
